## **ER1.3.  SECTION 3 -- REGULATORY RESULT**

### **ER1.3.1. LPS NET GAIN/LOSS ON ACTIVITY IN THE SLOVAKIA EN ROUTE CHARGING ZONE IN 2025**

LPS reported a net loss of -8.6 M€, as a combination of a loss of -5.5 M€ arising from the cost sharing mechanism, with a loss of -3.1 M€ arising from the traffic risk sharing mechanism.

### **ER1.3.2. LPS OVERALL REGULATORY RESULT (RR) FOR THE EN ROUTE ACTIVITY**

Ex-post, the overall RR, taking into account the net loss from the en route activity mentioned above (-8.6 M€) and the actual RoE (+2.2 M€), amounts to -6.4 M€ (-8.5% of the en route revenues). The resulting ex-post rate of return on equity is negative (-11.6%), compared to the 4.0% planned in the PP.

### **ER1.3.3. NOTES** 

#### **ER1.3.3.1. NOTE 1**

#### **ER1.3.3.2. NOTE 2**
